visual_dna.product_description: The Pigeon Air Fryer is a modern kitchen appliance designed for versatile cooking functions, including frying, defrosting, roasting, grilling, and baking. It features a sleek, compact design with a glossy black finish accented by gold trim, making it both functional and aesthetically pleasing. The digital touch control panel on the top provides intuitive operation, while the pull-out basket with a handle ensures ease of use. This air fryer is ideal for health-conscious cooking, offering a low-oil alternative to traditional frying methods.

materials.texture_description: smooth and polished surface with a reflective finish

lighting.shadow_characteristics: soft shadows cast to the bottom-right
highlights: on the top panel and gold accents

structure.overall_shape: rounded rectangular body with a slightly tapered top

motion_recommendations: slow 360-degree rotation to showcase the design
zoom in on the digital control panel
pull-out motion of the basket to highlight functionality
camera_angle_suggestions: front angle to display the logo and handle
top-down angle to highlight the digital control panel
side angle to emphasize the gold accents and overall shape

Want crispy, tasty snacks without the oil? The Pigeon Air Fryer is here to make healthy cooking easy & affordable. #KitchenTools #IndianCooking
Unbox convenience with the Pigeon Air Fryer! Affordable, easy-to-use, and perfect for Indian kitchens. 🛒 #BudgetGadgets
